scripts.build: npm run clean && npm run build -w @vladpazych/rig && npm run build -w @vladpazych/rig-logger-sinks
scripts.coverage: npm run build && npm run test:build && node -e "const fs=require('node:fs'); fs.rmSync('coverage',{recursive:true,force:true}); fs.mkdirSync('coverage/tmp',{recursive:true})" && NODE_V8_COVERAGE=coverage/tmp node --test $(find .test-build/packages/rig/test .test-build/packages/rig-logger-sinks/test -name '*.test.js' -type f | sort) && c8 report --all --temp-directory coverage/tmp --reporter=text --reporter=lcov --exclude .test-build/** --exclude coverage/** --exclude '**/*.d.ts' --exclude '**/src/**/*.ts' --exclude '**/test/**/*.ts' --exclude '**/scripts/**/*.js' --exclude '**/types.js' --exclude eslint.config.mjs --exclude prettier.config.mjs
scripts.release:check: npm run format:check && npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm test && npm run pack:check && npm run changeset:status
scripts.test: npm run build && npm run test:build && node --test $(find .test-build/packages/rig/test .test-build/packages/rig-logger-sinks/test -name '*.test.js' -type f | sort)
